full_text:
Huan Lin 桓鄰
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huan Lin (桓鄰). Urged Shi Hui to welcome the Wu officer Dai Liang. Angered Hui, and was flogged to death. Huan Lin was affiliated with Shi Xie. Huan Lin lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
